body:
## Problem

The 6 gear category pages (/gear/cymbals, /gear/snares, /gear/drums, /gear/pedals, /gear/sticks, /gear/hardware) are high purchase-intent pages (priority 0.9) that currently return **zero structured data** from the SSR handler.

```js
// api/meta/[...path].js:884 — current (lines 884–897)
const gearCategoryMatch = path.match(/^\/gear\/([a-z-]+)$/);
if (gearCategoryMatch && !gearCategoryMatch[1].startsWith('item')) {
  return {
    title: `Best ${catMeta.name} for Metal — What the Pros Use | ${SITE_NAME}`,
    description: catMeta.description,
    // ← NO articleSchema, NO breadcrumbSchema, NO faqSchema
  };
}
```

Compare to /technique/<slug>/drummers (line 430) which returns CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList + FAQPage. Gear category pages at same priority with higher commercial intent serve NO schema.

## Fix

File: `api/meta/[...path].js` — expand the gearCategoryMatch return block (lines 884–897)

Add:
1. **CollectionPage** in `articleSchema` — `@type: 'CollectionPage'`, name/description/url/publisher
2. **BreadcrumbList** in `breadcrumbSchema` — [`Home`, `Gear`, `<Category Name>`]  
3. **FAQPage** in `faqSchema` — 3 Q&As per category:
   - "What are the best [cymbals] for metal?" → link to MetalForge page
   - "Which metal drummers use [cymbals]?" → reference the gear-by-brand data
   - "What should I look for in metal [cymbals]?" → genre-appropriate guidance

GEAR_CATEGORY_META already has `name` and `description` per slug — reuse.

## Pages affected

| URL | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| /gear/cymbals | 0.9 |
| /gear/snares | 0.9 |
| /gear/drums | 0.9 |
| /gear/pedals | 0.9 |
| /gear/sticks | 0.9 |
| /gear/hardware | 0.9 |

## Quality gate
- [ ] CollectionPage emits in SSR HTML (curl check)
- [ ] BreadcrumbList renders as separate JSON-LD block
- [ ] FAQPage has ≥3 Q&As with non-empty answers
- [ ] Breadcrumb shows 3 levels: Home > Gear > {Category}
- [ ] Google Rich Results Test validates CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList

## Estimated uplift
Purchase-intent gear category queries ("best metal cymbals", "top metal snare drums") currently serve no schema. FAQPage = AI Overview eligibility for these high-commercial-intent queries. BreadcrumbList = SERP breadcrumb display. CollectionPage = entity-type signal for product/gear discovery.

## Done
- [x]  gearCategoryMatch block returns articleSchema (CollectionPage) + breadcrumbSchema (3-level) + faqSchema (3 Q&As)
title: SEO batch: /gear/<category> pages — add CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList + FAQPage JSON-LD schema (~6 pages)
